stemHtml:
Refer to figure. 
Prior to an IFR flight, when filling in the ATS flight plan, the time information which should be entered in box 16 "Total Estimated Elapsed time" is the time elapsed from…

options.a: taxi-out prior to take-off until taxiing completion after landing.
options.c: take-off until reaching the IAF (Initial Approach Fix) of the destination aerodrome.
options.d: taxiing until the IAF (Initial Approach Fix) of the destination aerodrome.
